## Purpose and Content
Applies more column operations to the implicit tendency evaluation

## Benefits and Risks
~~At the moment this still causes significant memory allocations. Need to figure out what is going on.~~
The autodiff handling was causing inference issues. Fixed by adding a function barrier to extract variables

body:
This PR adds a job to tabulate a summary of performance changes to the performance targets. A few pieces are added here:

 - For each performance target job, we export a `perf_benchmark_$job_id.json` file.
 - After all example/perf jobs run, we merge all of these files into a `perf_benchmarks.json` file in the `tabulate_perf_summary.jl` script.
 - We then tabulate the results from `perf_benchmarks.json`
 - In the `move_output` job, we also move the `perf_benchmarks.json` into main (for future comparisons)

The table for the unthreaded job looks like this:

```
[ Info: ##################################### Perf summary for job `perf_target_unthreaded`
[ Info: Metric: Allocations
┌─────────────────────────────┬──────────────┬────────────┬───────────┬────────────────────────┐
│ Function                    │ older_commit │ old_commit │   This PR │         Percent change │
│                             │              │            │           │ (PR - main)/main × 100 │
├─────────────────────────────┼──────────────┼────────────┼───────────┼────────────────────────┤
│ Wfact                       │    33.88 MiB │  33.88 MiB │ 33.88 MiB │                    0.0 │
│ linsolve                    │    18.68 MiB │  18.68 MiB │ 18.68 MiB │                    0.0 │
│ implicit_tendency!          │    11.45 KiB │  11.45 KiB │ 11.45 KiB │                    0.0 │
│ remaining_tendency!         │    25.38 KiB │  25.38 KiB │ 25.38 KiB │                    0.0 │
│ default_remaining_tendency! │    21.47 KiB │  21.47 KiB │ 21.47 KiB │                    0.0 │
│ hyperdiffusion_tendency!    │     2.59 KiB │   2.59 KiB │  2.59 KiB │                    0.0 │
│ step!                       │    71.88 MiB │  71.88 MiB │ 71.88 MiB │                    0.0 │
└─────────────────────────────┴──────────────┴────────────┴───────────┴────────────────────────┘
[ Info: Metric: Time (ave)
┌─────────────────────────────┬──────────────┬────────────┬────────────┬────────────────────────┐
│ Function                    │ older_commit │ old_commit │    This PR │         Percent change │
│                             │              │            │            │ (PR - main)/main × 100 │
├─────────────────────────────┼──────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────────────────┤
│ Wfact                       │    30.525 ms │  30.132 ms │  31.126 ms │                3.30028 │
│ linsolve                    │    19.054 ms │  19.903 ms │  18.732 ms │               -5.88384 │
│ implicit_tendency!          │    24.031 ms │  20.306 ms │  21.967 ms │                8.18074 │
│ remaining_tendency!         │    51.728 ms │  51.678 ms │  54.697 ms │                5.84343 │
│ default_remaining_tendency! │    41.309 ms │  41.648 ms │  41.018 ms │               -1.51275 │
│ hyperdiffusion_tendency!    │     8.844 ms │   8.823 ms │  10.608 ms │                20.2361 │
│ step!                       │   287.502 ms │ 283.691 ms │ 294.938 ms │                3.96463 │
└─────────────────────────────┴──────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────────────────┘
```

In addition, the percent change column is color-coded indicating performance improvement (green) and degradation (bad).

Also, the `older_commit` and `old_commit` will be commit hashes.
title: Add job to tabulate performance summary
